note: Implemented handshake packet routing, timer integration, state transition logging, and outbound packet queuing in tunnel.rs. Added: set_state() with logging, pending_outbound queue on WgTunnel, tick_timers() free function, poll_tunnel() composition function. route_outbound() now queues packets when tunnel not established and drains them after handshake. 8 new tests (367 total), all pass, clippy clean.
